name: ruby-opt-parse-validator
title: ruby-opt-parse-validator
description:
Ruby OptionParser Validators
This package contains an implementation of validators for the ruby
OptionParser lib. It's mainly used in the CMSScanner gem to define the cli
options available.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use ruby-opt-parse-validator because Ruby OptionParser Validators.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use ruby-opt-parse-validator as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair ruby-opt-parse-validator with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `ruby-opt-parse-validator --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
